authors.author: Unbekannt
Phil Burt
Wie groß ist mein Gott, kein andrer wie er

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How great is our God. How great is His Name. He's the greatest One, Forever the same. He rolled back the waters, Of the mighty Red Sea. And He said I'm going to lead you, Put your trust in Me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: How great is our God. How great is His Word. He's the greatest One, That ever was heard. He's unveiling His treasures For those who will see And He said I'm going to give you Anointed ministry.
